plan_books_chapter_scope_check.name: plan_books_chapter_scope_check
plan_books_chapter_scope_check.value: ("plan_books"."chapter_start" IS NULL AND "plan_books"."chapter_end" IS NULL) OR ("plan_books"."chapter_start" IS NOT NULL AND "plan_books"."chapter_end" IS NOT NULL AND "plan_books"."chapter_start" >= 1 AND "plan_books"."chapter_end" >= "plan_books"."chapter_start")

reading_logs_verse_range_check.name: reading_logs_verse_range_check
reading_logs_verse_range_check.value: ("reading_logs"."verse_start" IS NULL AND "reading_logs"."verse_end" IS NULL) OR ("reading_logs"."verse_start" IS NOT NULL AND "reading_logs"."verse_end" IS NOT NULL AND "reading_logs"."verse_end" >= "reading_logs"."verse_start")
